title: Sorjus
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Sorjus-TEA.jpg]] |name=Sorjus |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Sorjus system/Legends|Sorjus system]] *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Sorjus system/Legends|Sorjus system]] |sector=[[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] |system=[[Sorjus system/Legends|Sorjus system]] |coordinates=R-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Paaerduag]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]] }} '''Sorjus''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Paaerduag]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] [[Ja'Gatcha]] and [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]] were two Paaerduag who had left their home planet by [[3956 BBY]]. ==Description== Sorjus was a small terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated in the [[Sorjus system/Legends|Sorjus system]], a part of the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] of the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It lay far off the [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] known as the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' The planet's climate was much less [[Water/Legends|arid]] than that of the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector's]] [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. ==History== During the [[Jedi Civil War]] of [[3959 BBY]]–[[3956 BBY]], Sorjus fell within the territory controlled by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|empire]] founded by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]]. At some point by the latter [[Standard year/Legends|year]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]]. the [[Paaerduag]] [[Ja'Gatcha]] had left Sorjus, their [[Species/Legends|species']] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], and had become a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] whose travels took them to the planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] of the [[Ojoster sector/Legends|Ojoster sector]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Taris system/Legends|Taris system]] Around the same [[Time/Legends|time]], [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]], who—like Ja'Gatcha—spoke a non-[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] [[Language/Legends|language]] and also believed that Sorjus was an unimportant [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] travel stop, was another Paaerduag who had traveled offworld, eventually becoming a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] on Tatooine. ==Inhabitants== {{Main|Paaerduag}} Sorjus was the homeworld of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] Paaerduag species, members of which were a composite of two fused beings. The planet's true name was unpronounceable by species whose members spoke with a single voice—such as [[Human/Legends|Humans]]—and "Sorjus" was merely a name that such species could use. The Paaerduag Mic'tunan'jus Orgu believed that the latter name had originated due to the need for such a word to exist for the purpose of use by the commerce along the interstellar [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|What planet are you from?''"
«''You couldn't say it, and don't have the ears for it. Two voices create the name, and four ears hear the true sound. But your kind would call our home Sorjus, a small world far off the Perlemian trade route.''»|quoteend=0|A possible conversation between the player character, Revan, and Ja'Gatcha in ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic''|}} [[File:JaGatcha-KOTOR.jpg|thumb|right|220px|In ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'', Sorjus can be mentioned by the Paaerduag character Ja'Gatcha.]] Sorjus was introduced in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. In the accompanying [[Prima Games]]' [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]], "Sorjus" is erroneously given as the species name of the Paaerduag character Mic'tunan'jus Orgu.[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Sorjus [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square R-7. In ''Knights of the Old Republic'', Sorjus can be mentioned in two similar optional conversations the Human player character, Revan, can have with the Paaerduags Ja'Gatcha and Mic'tunan'jus Orgu. If Revan asks Ja'Gatcha if they can tell them more about Sorjus, the spacer replies that they would rather not be reminded of their homeworld due to it making the quarantine imposed on the planet Taris by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] at the time harder to bear, and that they wished for that state to end so that they could return home. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{C|Misidentification of [[Paaerduag]]}} *{{CSWECite|III||Paaerduag}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Sorjus}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sorjus |es=Sorjus |fi=Sorjus |nl=Sorjus |pl=Sorjus }} [[Category:Darth Revan's Sith Empire planets]] [[Category:Meridian sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
